title: Behavior Entity Types
description: List of entity-type filters used by behavior components.

filters.description: Filter to test entities of this type.

max_dist.description: Maximum distance in blocks at which the entity can be detected.

must_see.description: Whether the entity must be visible (line of sight) to be detected.

must_see_forget_duration.description: Time in seconds before a lost target is forgotten even if it cannot be seen.

sprint_speed_multiplier.description: Sprint speed multiplier when pursuing this entity type.

walk_speed_multiplier.description: Walk speed multiplier when pursuing this entity type.

reevaluate_description.description: Whether to re-evaluate the filter description each tick.
